name: Deposition Digest
description: Real-time deposition capture and analysis. Wear your Omi during a deposition — get a full timestamped transcript with key admissions flagged, contradictions identified, and follow-up questions generated automatically. No upload required. Built for solo attorneys and small litigation firms.
memory_prompt: The user is an attorney conducting or defending a deposition. Capture all spoken testimony. Flag any admissions, contradictions, or notable statements for legal analysis.
author: OmiDeveloper

external_integration.setup_instructions: 1. Deploy this app to Railway. 2. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var. 3. Add your Railway webhook URL above. 4. In the Omi app, go to Apps → add external integration with the webhook URL.
external_integration.auth_steps: No auth required for the free tier webhook.
